reason: Enabling the dracut FIPS module modifies the initramfs to enforce FIPS mode, which is not supported on an already‑installed RHEL 9 system. Applying the change can render the system unbootable and cause loss of SSH/console access, so remediation is considered too risky.
estimated_impact: reboot required; authentication/authorization affected; potential boot failure; loss of remote access; system instability; non‑supported configuration on existing install
